form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding by Cracksman out of Flying Cloud who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Profiles nicely and is worth keeping safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Four-year-old gelding by Cracksman out of Flying Cloud who has taken a long time to make it to the track. Profiles nicely and is worth keeping safe.

form.formComment: Most recently 9th of 23 at Curragh on March 15 over 1609m, on heavy track; 25 len behind Victory Tip carrying 66.5kg at $41. The start before that won by 1.3 len at Fairyhouse February 21 over 3319m in the wet defeating Simply Natural carrying 72.5kg at $3. Can atone.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Freshened for 61 days. First-up didn't finish the race at Navan December 14 over 3218m. Last start didn't finish the race at Naas February 7 over 3118m. Solid prospect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Freshened for 61 days. First-up didn't finish the race at Navan December 14 over 3218m. Last start didn't finish the race at Naas February 7 over 3118m. Solid prospect.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 10th of 12 at Naas on March 22 over 1408m, on a slow track; 13 len behind Independent Expert carrying 60.5kg at $10. Previously second-up 2nd of 11 at this track on June 2 over 1911m, 2.5 len behind Maestro Mark with 61kg at $1.50. Strips fitter and is well-placed to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5). Second-up. form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Only had one start last campaign 5th of 14 at Curragh on September 28 2024 over 1408m, 5 len behind Apples And Bananas carrying 59.5kg at $34. When resuming last campaign 3rd of 13 at this track on June 16 2024 over 1408m, 2.25 len behind The Parthenon with 60.5kg at $12. This is an ideal race to kick off. In the right race and sure to go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Back after a long spell. form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign fourth of 13 at Leopardstown October 19 over 1810m, in the wet; 4.5 len behind Playin Cool carrying 61kg at $9. On debut fifth of 10 at Leopardstown August 21 over 1609m, 7 len behind Falls Of Acharn carrying 61kg at $5.50. Can go on to better things this campaign.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start didn't finish the race at Clonmel June 6 over 3419m. Returned from break didn't finish the race at Navan February 8 over 3218m. Hard to get excited about his chances.
